overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game depicting an ancient Greek harbor city at night. The player character walks along a mosaic-tiled waterfront promenade past classical statues and temples, illuminated by moonlight and fire braziers. The character explores the harbor area, turning around to approach a grand monumental staircase flanked by marble statues.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with geometric mosaic pavement

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade away from the grand staircase, with harbor water to the right and ancient city buildings to the left

entered.detail: tall classical marble statue of a robed figure on a stone pedestal
intricate geometric patterned stone tiles covering the waterfront walkway
calm dark water of the harbor reflecting moonlight
lit fire bowl on a stone pedestal providing warm orange light
classical Greek architecture with columns and limestone walls
square stone tower at the harbor entrance with crenellations
ancient wooden trireme with sails visible in the harbor distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a moonlit ancient Greek waterfront. The character walks along a mosaic-tiled promenade with the harbor on the right and classical architecture on the left. A robed marble statue stands prominently nearby, while a defensive tower and sailing ship are visible in the distance across the calm water.

scene_state.functional_zone: monumental staircase approach with classical temple architecture

events.description: character turns around 180 degrees at the end of the promenade and begins walking back toward the grand staircase
approaching the grand staircase plaza with monumental statues and temple structures becoming prominent in the foreground

agents.ego_description: turning around at the harbor's edge and walking back toward the grand staircase, exploring the architectural surroundings with the moon now visible overhead

entered.detail: wide stone staircase with multiple steps leading up to the temple complex
twin monumental robed marble statues flanking the staircase entrance
ancient Greek temple with ionic columns on the elevated hillside
tall narrow stone pillar monument with pointed top
multiple fire bowls illuminating the staircase approach with warm light

segments.scene_description: The character turns around at the waterfront's end and walks back toward a grand monumental staircase. As the camera approaches, twin marble statues flanking the stairs become prominent, along with a classical temple and stone obelisk on the hillside. The scene transitions from open waterfront to a more architecturally enclosed plaza with lit braziers providing warm illumination against the cool moonlight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a moonlit ancient Greek waterfront that gradually shifts toward a grand, architecturally enclosed plaza. It begins with the character walking along a mosaic-tiled promenade, passing a robed marble statue while a defensive tower and sailing ship remain visible across the calm harbor. As the character reaches the end of the waterfront, the camera turns around to head back toward the city's interior. The scene then opens up to reveal a monumental staircase flanked by twin marble statues, with a classical temple and stone obelisk rising on the hillside. Finally, the cool moonlight blends with the warm glow of lit braziers as the camera approaches the imposing stone structures of the plaza.
